title: Reasoning behind the line I wont be your puppet and quot
display_title: Reasoning behind the line I wont be your puppet and quot
wikitext:
[]: Reasoning behind the line "I won't be your puppet.&quot             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Aug 24, 2006 4:37 pm Since Rei = Yui (sort of), maybe Rei was mad at Gendou for being mean to her "son". Since Gendou left Shinji so he could get back to Yui, Rei/Yui realizes the trouble that Gendou has caused to try to get back to Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Aug 25, 2006 1:09 pm Either that or she's mad at him for manipulating her for, at least, 5 years.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:10 pm Keep in mind the FULL context, which includes... *** Rei: I'm not your doll. Gendo: Why!? Rei: Because I'm not you. *** ("Doll" can also be "puppet".) There's also the rest of the "doll" motif in NGE to take account of. Everything's part of a bigger equation.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:12 pm Keep in mind, this is the 3rd incarnation of Rei, since the personalities of the first 2 are different, it isn't much of a leap that the 3rd is also different. That together with the knowledge of what she really is (thanks to Kaworu), I'd say that was a random variable. Plus, Gendo was forced to put his 3I scenario into motion because of the invasion. It could be the case that his plans involved a more carefully timed and monitored process.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Aug 25, 2006 5:55 pm Reichu wrote: Rei: I'm not your doll. Gendo: Why!? Rei: Because I'm not you.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 26, 2006 1:18 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I think there could be a few layers of meaning in that line. "Because I'm not you."
